name: python3-rfc3986-validator
title: python3-rfc3986-validator
description:
RFC 3986 validator (Python library)
This package provides a validator for URIs to determine whether they
conform to the Internet Engineering Task Force (IETF) specification
(RFC 3986).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-rfc3986-validator because RFC 3986 validator (Python library).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-rfc3986-validator as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-rfc3986-validator with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-rfc3986-validator --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
